# Training Communications Studio Instructions

Use `AGENTS.md` as the canonical repository guidance.

Before changing persistence, scheduling, auth, SMTP, AI, or template rendering, read `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`.

Before broad refactors or cross-route work, read `docs/AI-MAINTAINER.md`.

Before changing agent-facing guidance, rules, skills, prompts, agents, or validation policy, read `docs/AGENTIC-OPERATING-MODEL.md`.

Run `npm run agent:check` before claiming changes are complete.
